title: Gates-Hillman Center
subtitle: Pittsburgh • S3D/SCS
description: The iconic masterpiece of the School of Computer Science (SCS) at Carnegie Mellon.

title: The Fence & The Cut
subtitle: Pittsburgh • Traditions
description: One of the most storied traditions on campus. Students paint it overnight to celebrate milestones.

title: Phipps Conservatory
subtitle: Pittsburgh • Romance
description: Located just steps from campus, this Victorian glasshouse is one of the most beautiful botanical gardens in the world.

title: Grandview Overlook
subtitle: Pittsburgh • The View
description: The ultimate celebratory view. Take the incline up to see where the three rivers meet.

title: The National Mall
subtitle: DC • History
description: The historic heart of DC. Walk between the Washington Monument and the Lincoln Memorial.

title: Historic Georgetown
subtitle: DC • Atmosphere
description: Cobblestone streets, colorful townhouses, and upscale dining by the Potomac River.

title: The High Line Park
subtitle: NYC • Modern Life
description: A vibrant elevated park built on a historic rail line.

title: Central Park Oasis
subtitle: NYC • Romance
description: The most romantic spot in NYC. A beautiful cast-iron bridge.
